threats.title: Ivanti, Fortinet, and SAP Release Patches for Multiple Critical Vulnerabilities
threats.summary: Fortinet, Ivanti, and SAP have released security updates to address multiple critical security vulnerabilities that could result in arbitrary code execution and information disclosure.
